Rule D: Synthetic IDs MUST conform to locked schema (dropped PLACE-ECON-MICRO, IB-MATH-6)
Rule E: Brooklyn-only suffixes (dropped Abu Dhabi -AD, -UC, -GP references)

silent_failures_category.definition: Bulletin Prerequisites line contains course references but parser output has empty prereqGroups and empty coreqs

abu_dhabi_campus_category.definition: LLM extracted course IDs from Abu Dhabi campus (suffixes -AD, -UC, -GP), outside Brooklyn catalog scope

test_suite_adjustments.ratcheting_tolerance: Violations count ≤ 16 (will decrease as Abu Dhabi refs curated)
